sys_script_include.description:
2.8.4 HF | 2024-04-23 | raj | DFCT0012405 - Primary Assignee field updating slowly 30+ seconds when Assigned Member onChange field entered first - performance fix 2.8.5 | 2023-09-07| raj | STRY0136615 - STRETCH-PLACEHOLDER- Header UI Control 2.8.3 | 2023-06-05 - raj - DFCT0011926 - In New Task/Subtask Form, choosing an Assigned Member while the Primary Assignee is empty does NOT auto-populate to the Default OU of the Assigned Member 2.8.1 | 2023-01-23 | raj | STRY0134743 - Out of Office Message on Task Request Form 2.8.1 | 2022-09-21| raj | STRY0130635 - Task Form- Assignee is Out of Office 2.8.0 | 2022-09-21| raj | STRY0130088 - 2.8 Certifier requested updates - 6. isLoading in OnChange ClientScript 2.8 | 2022-08-16 | raj | DFCT0011167 - Stretch: (Discussion Defect) SubCategory on Task Form should NOT display if the list is empty 2.8 | 2022-07-23 | raj | DFCT0011092 - Mobile - New Task form does NOT display on the Mobile 2.8 | 2022-07-06 | raj | STRY0116785 - ICE- Confirmation Modal: Updating OU Abbreviation updates Tasker Number 2.7.1 | 2021-11-27 | raj | STRY0114396 - New function to set default Primary Assignee
2.7.0 STRY0102134 - Apply Default Schedule to Task Information 2.7.0 | 2021-09-14 | mmcc | STRY0099532 - DIA- 'Mass Reopen' Task Tree Modal (MVP) 2.7.0 | 2021-11-16 | raj | STRY0113838 - Tasker Settings- Allow for custom "URL Suffix" for Tasker Portal - chagned this function : taskGetTaskSysId() to taskGetRedirectURL and moved to client_tasker_User_Form_Preferences
2.6 STRY0091972 - "On Change" of a valid "Suspense date" on the top task with a sub task the "Suspense date error message" is displayed.
2.5 Patch 3 STRY0082087 - Restricted Group - (Portal & Platform)Task Form - Confirmation message - Restricted group selected after user selects OUs or Assigned Members STRY0083025 - Restricted Group - (Portal & Platform) Template form - Confirmation message - Restricted group selected after user selects OUs or Assigned Members STRY0083027 - Restricted Group - (Portal & Platform) Template Task form - Confirmation message - Restricted group selected after user selects OUs or Assigned Members
v2.5.13: - STRY0076598: New method to Reopen a Task - STRY0076619- Task Form - TASK ORDER Field filter on New Subtask form and prompt for user on Save.
v2.5.15: STRY0077855 - Information message on Parent Task's Suspense Date Field - Subtask's Suspense Date is after Parent Task's Suspense Date STRY0077847 - Information message on Subtask's Suspense Date field - Subtask's Suspense Date is after Parent Task's Suspense Date STRY0079667 - when reopening a task, set the Signature instructioins complete back to false.
Has two funcitons: 1 - taskParentHasSubtasks() - returns number of children tasks the parent task has. 2 - taskGetTaskSysId() - Returns the task sys_id for a task that was created from a suggested task
sys_script_include.name: ClientTaskInfo
